name: Liquor
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the nectar and sugar in a saucepan.
2. Heat until the sugar is dissolved, then allow to cool.
3. Add the vodka and store in an airtight bottle.
4. Allow the mixture to sit for at least one year before consuming.
5. Optionally, add a piece of firm fruit to the bottle for additional flavor. Suitable fruits include jackfruit, lychee, guava, or other tropical fruits available in your area. Alternatively, use syrup from canned fruit and mix it with the vodka, adding some of the fruit.
6. For a sweeter liquor, reduce the amount of vodka or increase the sugar content (the recipe is tart but becomes mellow over time). Sweeter versions pair well with vanilla Tofutti or other vegan-friendly ice creams.
